priority_basis: R-018 identified that observation coverage was not composed into the R-017 replay-acceptance boundary.
action: Compose replay acceptance and Event Timing coverage into one fail-closed interpretation gate.

progress.finding: Structural replay validity and observation coverage are independent; neither should authorize interpretation alone.

handoff: Vercel Studio should invoke evaluateEventTimingInterpretation immediately before replay interpretation and reject partial coverage even when lower-level replay structure passes.
limits: No deployed Vercel integration invokes the composite gate.
No physical iPhone Safari packet was evaluated.
The primary standard remains a Working Draft.
The current gate authorizes only the narrow zero-interaction absence interpretation; non-zero interaction interpretation remains unresolved.
Passing proves contract compatibility, not event delivery, responsiveness quality, replay completeness, visual divergence, or causality.
next_action: Add same-navigation binding between the coverage packet and replay evidence, then collect physical Safari fixtures for early observer, late observer, buffered sub-threshold interaction, and live threshold-visible interaction.
